subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1911-11-26 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Good news! Good news! The doors of the Kingdom of God are open!... Be Happy! Be Happy! Be full of Joy!
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @call to action, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal peace; world unity, @love of God, @The Holy Spirit
